exercises.title: Syndrome Calculator
exercises.description: Compute syndromes for various errors on stabilizer codes.
tasks: Implement syndrome calculation from error and generators
Test on single-qubit X, Y, Z errors
Verify syndrome is zero for stabilizers
Build complete syndrome table for a code
Identify unique syndromes for correctable errors
hints: Anticommute: X-Z, X-Y, Y-Z at same position
Syndrome bit = parity of anticommuting positions

exercises.title: Syndrome Measurement Circuit
tasks: Implement controlled-X, controlled-Z gates
Build ancilla-based measurement circuit for one stabilizer
Simulate measurement outcomes for clean and errored states
Verify syndrome bit matches theoretical prediction
Extend to full syndrome extraction (all generators)
hints: Use 2^(n+1) dimensional state for n data + 1 ancilla
Hadamard on ancilla: H|0⟩=|+⟩, H|+⟩=|0⟩, H|-⟩=|1⟩
Measure ancilla by tracing out data qubits

exercises.title: Syndrome Decoder
exercises.description: Build a lookup-table decoder for syndrome-based error correction.
tasks: Create syndrome → error lookup table
Handle X, Y, Z errors on all qubits
Implement error correction function
Test complete correction cycle
Analyze decoder for multiple codes (Steane, 5-qubit)
hints: Pre-compute syndromes for all single errors
Store (qubit, pauli) pairs keyed by syndrome
Verify: encode → error → syndrome → correct → check

exercises.title: Syndrome Measurement Error Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze the effect of errors during syndrome measurement.
tasks: Model ancilla errors (bit-flip, phase-flip)
Simulate faulty syndrome measurement
Compute probability of wrong syndrome
Implement repeated measurement for reliability
Analyze threshold for fault-tolerant syndrome extraction
hints: Single measurement error → might correct wrong qubit
Threshold: p_ancilla < p_data for net benefit
